description: Configure Wazuh to detect potential ransomware behavior by monitoring the directory '/var/ossec/data/financial_records' for rapid file deletions. Enable real-time File Integrity Monitoring for this directory and implement a custom correlation rule (ID 100250) at alert level 12. The rule must trigger when 5 or more file deletions (referencing rule 553) occur within a 45-second window and must be mapped to MITRE ATT&CK ID T1485 (Data Destruction). Ensure the configuration is active on the Wazuh manager.
